issues.description: TrashFromHand is incorrect. Text says 'trash 2 cards from the top of your deck', which means trashing from deck, not hand. Should use a deck-trash action or equivalent.
Rest action is mandatory ('You may rest') but DSL structure does not reflect optionality. The Rest should be conditional/optional, making the subsequent KO and trash conditional on resting.
KO target should reflect 'up to 1', meaning it is optional. Current scope does not capture optionality (0 or 1 selection).
